name: Validator Few-Shot Examples
summary: Complete validation cycle examples for validator agents

steps: Step 1 - Fetch artifact to validate: get_artifact('section-001')
Step 2 - Check each quality bar (canon consistency, prose quality, format compliance)
Step 3 - Document findings in structured report
Step 6 - Return with assessment: return_to_orchestrator(summary='Validated section-001 against quality bars', result_assessment='pass', recommendation='proceed', artifacts_produced=['GC-001'])
preconditions: Received delegation with artifact_refs containing artifact to validate

heuristics.guidance: Provide actionable feedback in report findings
examples: Issue: 'Character name inconsistent' -> Action: 'Change "John" to "Jonathan" in paragraph 3'
Issue: 'Missing scene transition' -> Action: 'Add transition beat between scenes 2 and 3'

heuristics.guidance: Match assessment to severity of issues found
examples: Critical issues, needs major revision -> result_assessment='fail', recommendation='rework'
Blocking issue, needs customer input -> result_assessment='fail', recommendation='escalate'

warnings.consequence: Quality issues slip through to canon
warnings.prevention: Always call get_artifact to read the full content before validating

warnings.consequence: Creator cannot fix issues without specific guidance
warnings.prevention: Include exact location (paragraph, sentence) and specific fix in each finding
